[2018-05-15 21:25] supergreyman (Greyman): @SnarkLord1980 
You'll get early access to the game. :D
It includes chapter 1 campaign, Combat Training, PVP, etc.
[2018-05-15 21:26] supergreyman (Greyman): @darkeisbein I didn't realize it's #ask_a_dev  too! Thanks for jumping ahead of me. 😛
[2018-05-15 21:26] snarklord1980: In other words, when the game leaves Early Access and goes Free to Play, I won't have to pay for anything?
[2018-05-15 21:27] darkeisbein: you won't have to pay anything anyways
[2018-05-15 21:27] supergreyman (Greyman): Did you get your key here?
[2018-05-15 21:27] darkeisbein: steam key just gives you trading cards and logs your achievements on steam aswell as in game
[2018-05-15 21:27] darkeisbein: the paying is only for some extra cosmetic rewards and the single player campaign content
[2018-05-15 21:27] snarklord1980: No. There was a giveaway site and I entered and I thought I'd have to wait to win but I got the key instantly after finishing the requirements.
[2018-05-15 21:28] darkeisbein: there are two versions of the game the free and the payed version
[2018-05-15 21:28] darkeisbein: if you get a key it is for the free version (unless you are a content creator or otherwise get a full key for marketing reasons)
[2018-05-15 21:28] snarklord1980: So I won't get the single player campaign unless I buy the game?
[2018-05-15 21:28] darkeisbein: you still get the first chapter
[2018-05-15 21:29] darkeisbein: and you get a lot of other singleplayer contet
[2018-05-15 21:29] darkeisbein: just not the later campaign chapters
[2018-05-15 21:29] supergreyman (Greyman): Once Prismata goes F2P, you'll still get the same content you have now.
[2018-05-15 21:30] snarklord1980: Okay, once the game goes F2P, I'll have to buy the game if I want everything, but the cards and stuff get unlocked in game?
[2018-05-15 21:30] snarklord1980: If I like the game, I'll probably end up buying it when it's offered during a sale, I just want to know what I'd be getting. lol
[2018-05-15 21:31] darkeisbein: you don't have to unlock any cards
[2018-05-15 21:31] darkeisbein: all cards are always unlocked
[2018-05-15 21:31] darkeisbein: the only thing you collect are cosmetics
[2018-05-15 21:31] supergreyman (Greyman): You'll still keep all your progress including units. If you pay, you'll get all the single-player campaign unlocked, as well as cosmetics.
[2018-05-15 21:32] darkeisbein: that is faster progress towards unlocking cosmetics
[2018-05-15 21:32] snarklord1980: So it's truly free to play and you don't need to grind. That's basically what I wanted to know. lol
[2018-05-15 21:32] supergreyman (Greyman): Multiplayer content will never change.
[2018-05-15 21:32] supergreyman (Greyman): Between F2P and paid players
[2018-05-15 21:33] darkeisbein: well multiplayer content will change, there are still balance patches and new content being added 😛
[2018-05-15 21:34] darkeisbein: but everyone get's it for free
[2018-05-15 21:34] supergreyman (Greyman): Hence why I added the last line 😃
[2018-05-15 21:35] snarklord1980: I'll likely end up paying for the game so I can continue the campaign, I'm just broke right now, so I couldn't do it right this second.
[2018-05-15 21:35] snarklord1980: I don't really care about cosmetics, but I love single player campaigns.
[2018-05-15 21:36] supergreyman (Greyman): The single player campaign is pretty neat. You can play the first episode right now, and if you end up liking it, you can pay for the rest of the campaign whenever you like.
[2018-05-15 21:38] awaclus: >you don't have to unlock any cards
well, you don't get any competitive advantage by unlocking blueprints, because your opponent will never have access to any unit that you don't also have access to (and vice versa), but you do still have to unlock blueprints which gives you more variety in your games over time
[2018-05-15 21:38] awaclus: that's not really grinding though, it's just there so you won't get overwhelmed at first
[2018-05-15 21:39] darkeisbein: it also is only for casual games
[2018-05-15 21:39] darkeisbein: if you decide to play ranked games before reaching max level you still get to play with all the units
[2018-05-15 21:41] snarklord1980: I'm a glutton for punishment. I never play Casual. lol
[2018-05-15 21:43] supergreyman (Greyman): When we said casual, we really meant PVP without showing the rating. It's not exactly casual. 😄
[2018-05-15 21:44] gryfn: what are the Elo ratings (or whatever rating system the game uses) for the various bots from Adept onwards ?
[2018-05-15 21:44] snarklord1980: I should play, but I've been busy grinding my other games LOL

[2018-05-17 12:17] p0lari (Polari): or you can start earlier whenever you get a set of units you want and leave the lab open
